memoryArtifacts.headline: Park Hall
memoryArtifacts.description: Descent: Sir John Botetourt, kt. sold 1373 to Sir Henry de Arden (d. c.1400), kt.; to son, Sir Ralph Arden (d. 1420), kt.; to son, Robert de Arden (d. 1452); to son, Walter Arden (d. 1502); to son, Sir John Arden (d. 1526), kt.; to son, Thomas Arden (d. 1563); to grandson, Edward Arden (d. 1583); forfeited to Crown and granted 1586 to Edward Darcy but in 1609 surrendered and returned to Robert Arden (d. 1635); to grandson, Robert Arden (d. 1643); to four sisters, from whom it was bought up by the husband of Godith Arden, Sir Herbert Price (fl. 1664); to son, John Price (fl. 1704); sold 1704 to John Bridgeman of Castle Bromwich Hall, with which it descended thereafter.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Arden於1373年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾時，他的父親Henry Arden28歲，母親Elena Wetenhall24歲。他於1412年與Sibel De Belgrave在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1421年在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Arden于1373年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾时，他的父亲Henry Arden28岁，母亲Elena Wetenhall24岁。他于1412年与Sibel De Belgrave在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1421年在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Arden was born in 1373, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Arden, was 28 and his mother, Elena Wetenhall, was 24. He married Sibel De Belgrave in 1412, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1421, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Arden est né en 1373, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Arden, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elena Wetenhall, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Sibel De Belgrave en 1412, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Park Hall, Lancashire, England: Park Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Arden 1373 in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Arden 28 und seine Mutter Elena Wetenhall 24. Er hat 1412 in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Sibel De Belgrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1421 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Sibel De Belgrave nel 1412, nel Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Ardenが1373年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルで生まれた時，父Henry Ardenは28歳，母Elena Wetenhallは24歳であった。1412年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルでSibel De Belgraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1421年に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Arden(이)가 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 박홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Arden(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena Wetenhall(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 박홀에서 Sibel De Belgrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1421년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 박홀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Arden nasceu em 1373, em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Arden, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elena Wetenhall, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibel De Belgrave em 1412, em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1421, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Park Hall, Lancashire, England: Park Hall, Lancashire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Arden родился в 1373 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Arden было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena Wetenhall, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibel De Belgrave в 1412 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1421 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sibel De Belgrave en 1412, en Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1421, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
